creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
Qemu dumps core with the message "Bad system call: 12 (core
	dumped)" on amd64. I've tried several qcow format images, all with
	the same result. 

	As far as I can tell, all executables malfunction, not just qemu,
	but qemu-system-ppc and qemu-system-x86_64 as well.

	Before updating, 8.1 and 8.2 worked fine.

How-To-Repeat: 	Install qemu on amd64. Try running it.
